slidelink.displaytext: 4. Frequent Monitoring of Pricing KPIs by Management

slidetranscripts.slidetranscript:
<Document xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <Content> <Block> <Span Text="Why is Pricing Excellence relevant for me as a sales professional?

" /> </Block> <Block> <Span Text="Choose your options and then, click Submit to confirm." /> </Block> </Content> </Document>
